nest_description: Custom Roleplay and multi-game framework modifications (FiveM, RedM, SA-MP).
name: FiveM Dedicated Server (GTA V)
description: Cfx.re FiveM GTA V customized multiplayer roleplay modification engine. Complete support for TxAdmin integration, custom custom server keys, ESX/QBCore framework setup, and database SQL links.
install_script: echo "Downloading latest Cfx.re FiveM active build fx.tar.xz..." && mkdir -p resources cache && echo "Finished."

config_files.template:
endpoint_add_tcp "0.0.0.0:{{SERVER_PORT}}"
endpoint_add_udp "0.0.0.0:{{SERVER_PORT}}"
sv_hostname "{{SERVER_NAME}}"
sets sv_projectName "{{SERVER_NAME}}"
sets sv_projectDesc "Orchestrated by -OZ- Panel Hub Enterprise"
sv_maxclients {{MAX_PLAYERS}}
set sv_licenseKey "{{FIVEM_LICENSE_KEY}}"
set steam_webApiKey "{{STEAM_WEB_API}}"
ensure mapmanager
ensure chat
ensure spawnmanager
ensure sessionmanager
ensure basic-gamemode
ensure hardcap
ensure rconlog
